description_long: This object is a sleek, modern airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of straight, low-mounted wings extending from either side. The wings are broad and rectangular, with additional horizontal stabilizers at the rear and no visible winglets. The fuselage is cylindrical and tapers at both ends, with a prominent jet engine intake at the nose and what appear to be jet exhausts at the rear. The surface is smooth and dark, with a metallic sheen, and there are no visible windows or cockpit details, giving it a minimalist, almost futuristic appearance. The tail section features a distinctive H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers. No landing gear is visible, suggesting it may be retracted or not modeled.
description: A sleek, dark airplane with straight low-mounted wings, a streamlined fuselage, and an H-tail configuration. The surface is smooth and metallic, with jet engine features and no visible cockpit or landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central jet intake, symmetrical low-mounted wings, and H-tail stabilizers.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the smooth, metallic fuselage and the absence of visible cockpit or landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet exhausts, H-tail, and the broad, rectangular wings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the streamlined body and the configuration of the wings and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight, rectangular wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted jet engine with visible intake and twin rear exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No visible cockpit; placement and configuration are not apparent.
